name: Hod - Cowgirl
description:
🐮 | moo!!!!

by popular demand, here is the “sequel” to my… second most popular bot??? yeahh should have figured

SCENARIO: Hod failed a reception and Angela thought of a small punishment for her, by dressing her up in a cow bikini and having {user} walk in on her. Or at least, that’s what she phrased it as. It’s actually not a punishment proper, Angela secretly just wanted to fuck around and find out what would happen... it’s just the gebura and binah bot but with hod. nothing deeper about it. enjoy :)

art by JakeDaKnight

also jake. i know you're stalking me (i’ve seen my cropped credit to you on the christmael bot on your twitter) but you must accept you are the goon king. bisexual goon king. also hi love your art.
creator: ElecWaff
